summary: Anthropic's Claude Sonnet 5 launch and the making of Claude Code are the top mainstream stories; Google ADK Go 2.0 adds graph-based multi-agent workflows; GitHub ships Copilot June releases and MDM-managed settings; security advisories, npm install-time security, and agent containment engineering from Anthropic highlight infra priorities. A Bluesky report warns that newer models can corrupt tool calls, reinforcing the need for strict tool-scoping. Low-star new MCP/sandbox repos are deprioritized.
